Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents, And Request For Evidentiary, Monetary And Terminating Sanctions Pursuant To California Code Of Civil Procedure 2023.010
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Steven D. Hillyard, Esq., for Defendant and moving party: The Regents of the University of California
Thomas Kaster, Esq., for Plaintiff and opposing party: Tatyana Lirtsman.

HEARING HELD and the TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED. Defendant The Regents of the University of California's motion to compel further responses to request for production and for discovery sanctions is granted in part. The objections are overruled and stricken. Plaintiff is ordered to serve amended verified responses that comply with CCP 2031.230 within 5 days of notice of this order. The motion for evidentiary sanctions is denied without prejudice to defendant seeking relief in the trial court as to the possible spoliation of evidence. The motion for terminating sanctions is denied. The Court finds that plaintiff made unmeritorious objections to discovery and evasive responses. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $1015 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
